GnOuGo.Browser.Mcp.Description: Web navigation via Playwright.NET MCP server

GnOuGo.Cmd.Mcp.Description: Secure allowlisted command execution via stdio MCP server

GnOuGo.Document.Mcp.Description: Document read/write MCP server (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, TXT, MD, CSV, JSON, XML, YAML)

GnOuGo.GithubCopilot.Mcp.Description: Code project operations via stdio MCP server, including safe file operations and GitHub Copilot suggestions

GnOuGo.Git.Mcp.Description: Git repository workflows via stdio MCP server using LibGit2Sharp

git_token.Description: Git access token injected into the bundled Git MCP as Git:Token. Leave empty during edit to keep the current token.
